description: Capability for the main window. opener:allow-open-path was `**` (card 25): it asks the OS to open a path with its DEFAULT HANDLER, so an unscoped grant let the webview launch any .app or executable on disk. Now scoped to $HOME, the profile dir, and the temp dirs where agents drop files they print as clickable links. NOTE: `**` never matches a dot-directory (Tauri sets require_literal_leading_dot on unix), which is why $HOME/.octiqflow needs its own entry. A project on a volume outside $HOME loses 'open externally'; add its root here if you keep one.
